topic: Diffusion Foundations (DDPM / Score / DDIM / EDM / CFG / Consistency Models)
byline: Ruofeng Yang (杨若峰), Shanghai Jiao Tong University

math_code_review.verdict: WARN (length only) after 3 rounds of fixes

rounds.issue: DPM-Solver VP g(t) sign; VP velocity bridge formula malformed; A.4 ConditionedEpsNet.forward returned undefined eps_pred; Q10 PF-ODE described as 'reverse SDE removed noise' (missing 1/2 score correction); Q7 mixed paper-w and HF guidance_scale conventions; DDIM citation wrong (Song 2020 ICLR -> arXiv 2020 / ICLR 2021); SDXL citation wrong (NeurIPS Datasets -> arXiv 2023 / ICLR 2024 spotlight); recruitment context (2026 秋招, OpenAI Sora / BFL / Runway / DeepMind 招聘 etc).
rounds.fix: Corrected g(t) = +β/sqrt(1-α_bar) (§9.1); rewrote VP velocity formula in α_t/σ_t form (§13.1); added backbone field + return eps_pred in ConditionedEpsNet; Q10 clarifies PF-ODE drift differs from reverse SDE by factor 1/2; Q7 distinguishes HF-style $s$ vs Ho-Salimans $w$ conventions; updated DDIM and SDXL citations; removed all recruitment / company-hire context.

rounds.issue: §6.4 likelihood change-of-variables sign error (should be + not - per Chen 2018 CNF); §8.4 stochastic churn noise formula used (σ_i γ)² instead of ((1+γ)σ_i)² - σ_i².
rounds.fix: Fixed PF-ODE likelihood formula to `log p_0 = log p_T + ∫ div v dt` with Chen 2018 citation; rewrote churn formula to `sqrt(σ_hat² - σ²) z` where σ_hat = (1+γ)σ, equivalent to `σ sqrt(2γ + γ²) z`.

rounds.issue: §6.3 unverified theorem number 'Theorem 13.1'; §8.4 churn equality chain still ambiguous; Q21 step 7 had `U{1,T}` instead of `U{1,...,T}`; Q24 iCT description wrong (claimed 'exponential decay EMA' but real iCT removes EMA teacher entirely).
rounds.fix: Removed unverified theorem number, kept paper title reference; rewrote churn formula to separate the equality into clear sub-expression; fixed Q21 step 7 to `U{1,...,T}`; rewrote iCT description (Song-Dhariwal 2024) to: removes EMA teacher + pseudo-Huber loss + lognormal noise + curriculum schedule.

rounds.issue: Q21 derivation list split into multiple <ol> blocks by display math $$...$$ separators, causing numbering to restart from 1 in HTML output.
rounds.fix: Restructured Q21 to use explicit **Step N** bullet prefix instead of markdown ordered-list numbering, so display math no longer breaks the sequence.

All 13 render-stage checks pass: information_fidelity, structure, math_code_tables, callouts, details_inner_markdown_rendered, safety_escaping, placeholder_leak, author_byline_rendered, eyebrow_subtitle_title, no_absolute_local_path_leak, no_personal_info_leak, heading_glue_fix, toc_sidebar_links_resolve.

summary: 3-round math/code review settled at WARN (math/code/citations PASS; length 1481 lines exceeds 1000±20% target but content substantive — per spec accepted as WARN). 2-round render review settled at PASS. All blocking issues fixed: DPM-Solver g(t) sign, VP velocity formula, PF-ODE drift coefficient (1/2 vs full), PF-ODE likelihood sign, EDM churn formula, ConditionedEpsNet code bug, CFG conventions, DDIM/SDXL citations, iCT description, Q21 list-numbering rendering bug, and all recruitment-context personal-info leaks.
